title: ipomoea turpethum
intro: Ipomoea turpethum, also known as Turpetha, is a plant species belonging to the Ipomoea genus, which is native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its laxative and anthelmintic effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea turpethum include its ability to treat constipation, diarrhea, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate joint pain. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea turpethum include decoctions, powders, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be monitored under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
